title: Workspace Configuration
description: Per-project workspace configuration. model_policy is the centralized cost-control surface for all agents in the workspace.

overview_doc.description: Relative path to the workspace overview document.

repos.description: Repositories that belong to this workspace.

ModelPhasePolicy.description: Model allowlist for one execution phase.

allowed.description: Model IDs the agent may use for this phase. Must be non-empty.

default.description: Model to use unless overridden. Must be present in allowed.

ModelPolicy.description: Per-phase model allowlist. Set once per workspace; agents inherit it. Tasks may override specific phases via ### Model overrides in tasks.md.

implementation.description: Model for writing code and running tools.

self_review.description: Model for reviewing the agent's own diff before opening a PR.

pr_description.description: Model for generating the PR title and body.

suggested_next_step.description: Model for generating a short triage hint when a task blocks.

RepoEntry.description: A repository that belongs to this workspace.

id.description: Repo identifier — used in task YAML repo field.

local_path.description: Local filesystem path or env: reference (e.g. env:MY_REPO_LOCAL_PATH).

base_branch.description: Default branch for this repo (e.g. main).
